verification.note: Reported by WirelessJEPA (Chu, Mashaal, Abou-Zeid, arXiv:2601.20190), linear-probe 500 samples/class: RF Fingerprinting 90.45% (k-NN 87.82%), verbatim from the paper's linear-probing table (verified via pdftotext). POWDER RF fingerprinting = 4 base stations (USRP X310, IEEE 802.11a) on the POWDER PAWR platform (Reus-Muns et al. GLOBECOM 2020), the SAME dataset as our board's POWDER site-ID column. NOT reproduced by this repo. from_paper_UNCERTAIN: (1) FEW-SHOT regime (frozen/adapted FM + light head), a different regime column from our from_scratch baselines; (2) the FM uses the 802.11a WiFi subset whereas our closed_set pools 4G/5G/WiFi waveforms (same-day, single day); (3) split indices unpublished. Same dataset + task (BS identification) + metric (rank1 accuracy), regime/subset not byte-confirmed identical -> uncertain. References our committed POWDER same-day split; a literature coverage point for the FM, never conflated with an in-repo run.
